name: CivicPlus Government Digital Services API
what_it_does: CivicPlus Government Digital Services REST API for local government website management, citizen engagement, and digital service delivery. Enables AI agents to manage government website content management for municipal digital communications, handle 311 service request management for citizen service request automation, access agenda and meeting management for government meeting workflow automation, retrieve permit and license integration for government services portal, manage civic engagement and community feedback for public participation workflow, handle emergency notification and alert system for public safety communication, access government document management and archive for municipal records management, retrieve citizen portal and self-service integration for government digital service delivery, manage payment and fee collection for government revenue workflow, and integrate CivicPlus with GIS, ERP (Tyler Munis), and public safety systems.
use_cases: Managing citizen service requests from 311 agents
Publishing government agendas from meeting management agents
Sending emergency alerts from public safety agents
Processing government payments from revenue agents
not_for: Federal government without local/state government context
Private sector without municipal government integration
Large city governments with custom citizen portals
best_when: A local government (city, county, township) using CivicPlus wants AI agents to automate citizen service requests, government communications, agenda management, and digital service delivery.
avoid_when: GOVERNMENT RECORDS LAW: CivicPlus manages public records — automated government content changes and service request handling must comply with state open records and government records retention laws; automated deletion creates government records law violations. ADA/Section 508 website accessibility — automated government website content must meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards for ADA and Section 508 compliance; automated content publication with accessibility failures creates ADA complaint risk. Emergency notification liability — automated emergency alert systems must be highly reliable; false alerts or missed alerts create public safety liability and potential government sovereign immunity waiver.

auth.notes: CivicPlus uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Manhattan, Kansas HQ. Founded 2000. Private (General Atlantic-backed). 10,000+ local government customers. Market leader in local government digital services. Competes with Granicus, Tyler Technologies, and OpenGov for local government software.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual government subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; module licensing for website, 311, agenda, etc.
pricing.notes: Manhattan, KS. Founded 2000. General Atlantic-backed. 10,000+ local government customers. Local government digital services leader. Competes with Granicus and Tyler for local government.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; government SLA terms

known_agent_gotchas: GOVERNMENT RECORDS RETENTION: Automated government content management must comply with state government records retention schedules; automated deletion or modification of public records outside retention policy creates state records law violations

ADA Section 508 accessibility — automated government website content publication must meet WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards; automated content with accessibility failures creates ADA Title II complaint risk for municipalities

Emergency alert reliability — automated emergency notification must have high reliability and fallback channels; false alerts create public panic and liability; missed alerts during actual emergency create public safety liability

Open records law compliance — CivicPlus manages public government records; automated content and service request handling creates public records subject to state FOIA/open records laws; automated processing must preserve records for retention

Citizen privacy in service requests — 311 service requests may contain citizen PII and location data; automated sharing of citizen service request data must comply with state privacy laws and local government data use policies
Multi-department workflow — government service requests often span multiple departments; automated routing must understand organizational structure and escalation paths that vary by jurisdiction
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local government digital services. SOC2, FedRAMP. API key/OAuth2. US. Citizen and government records data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Government digital services. SOC2, FedRAMP. OAuth2. US. Citizen and government data.
